schema.relayUrl: canonical root wss URL; no userinfo, non-root path, query, or fragment
schema.credentialIssuerUrl: canonical root https URL; no userinfo, non-root path, query, or fragment
schema.secretReferences: RelayV2HostCredentialSecretReference validator; bootstrap and refresh must differ

forbiddenProfileMaterial: TLS key, certificate, or trust material

filesystem.lock: exclusive create; existing safe lock is busy and is never removed automatically
publication: same-directory atomic hard-link create of profile with no replacement
destination EEXIST: strict existing-profile inspection; exact is idempotent, different/corrupt/unsafe fails closed without target replacement
verify temporary, profile, and descriptor are one inode with link count two
identity-safe unlink of temporary and verify profile link count one

createOnce.corruptUnknownOrUnsafe: fail closed without repair, migration, fallback, or overwrite

filesystem.readExisting: accept only optional trustedHome; require no active/unsafe lock; missing, corrupt, unknown, or unsafe fails closed without filesystem mutation
filesystem.metadata: reject symlink, non-regular file, foreign owner, wrong mode, or link count other than one
